text.title: kb-versioned-agent-memory-files Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kb-versioned-agent-memory-files as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Letting an LLM "consolidate" or "summarise" the memory files automatically.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The summary discards citations and rewrites prior entries with the model's current biases; the audit trail evaporates and reviewers cannot tell what was added vs invented.

failure-mode.description: Skipping session.md entirely and dumping live state into patterns.md or mistakes.md.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pollutes the audit log, breaks the append-only invariant, and makes the long-term files untrustworthy for the next agent that loads them.
